title: NETMARKET
noItems: No items available in this category.

blackMarket.title: Black Market
blackMarket.description: Fixers, stolen chrome, contraband clothes and deals that rotate every {{hours}} hours.
blackMarket.cleanersDesc: Lower your heat before a fixer starts overcharging you.
blackMarket.talentDiscount: Shop talents also reduce some prices here.
blackMarket.rule1: Each purchase increases heat. The hotter the city, the higher the prices.
blackMarket.rule2: Each fixer has their own rep. Big pieces require real cred, not just credits.
blackMarket.rule3: Some lots are reserved for a specialization. The black market likes useful profiles.
blackMarket.rule4: Only one trader rotates at a time. If you miss a window, that fixer's deal disappears.
blackMarket.playerExchangeDesc: List inventory in direct sales or player-run auctions.
blackMarket.partialPurchaseEnabled: Direct sales support partial purchases or buying the full stack.
blackMarket.auctionLotNote: Auctions sell the full lot: stack x{{n}}.
blackMarket.noSellableItems: No unequipped item is available for listing.
blackMarket.playerRule1: Each listed item pays an immediate tax. It is not refunded if the listing expires.
blackMarket.playerRule2: Direct sales let buyers choose a quantity or buy the full stack.
blackMarket.playerRule3: Auctions sell the full lot. A new highest bid automatically refunds the previous top bidder.
blackMarket.playerRule4: When an auction ends, the winner gets the items and the seller gets the credits.
blackMarket.marketFeedDesc: All active player listings visible on the black market.
blackMarket.noPlayerListings: No active listing matches this filter.
blackMarket.myListingsDesc: Track your active sales and cancel them when possible.
blackMarket.noOwnListings: You do not have any active listing.
